title: Stock Market Today (June 10, 2026): Dow dips 900 points as U.S. signals more strikes in Iran
summary: Dow -953 pts (-1.87%) to 49,918.78; S&P 500 -1.62% to 7,266.99; Nasdaq -1.98% to 25,169.50; Russell 2000 -1.10% to 2,835.46. VIX surged 11.9% to 22.22. All indexes closed near day's lows. Iran retaliated with strikes on US bases in Jordan, Bahrain, Kuwait. Trump: 'They've taken too long to negotiate...now they will have to pay the price!!!' May CPI 4.2% YoY (highest since April 2023). 62.7% of US issues advanced despite major index losses. Mag7: AAPL +0.6%, TSLA -3.6%, NVDA -3.4%.

title: Stock Market Live June 10, 2026: S&P 500 (SPY) Sinks on Fear of War
summary: SMCI crashed 27.69% (-$11.26) to $29.39 after announcing $7B equity financing for $39B AI server backlog. Largest losers: SMCI -27.69%, CTRA -8.62%, GNRC -7.94%, ZBRA -7.37%, NRG -7.37%. Top gainers: DVN +6%, APA +3.84%, SJM +3.72%, CPB +3.59%. Citi warns gold could drop another 20% by September if Strait of Hormuz remains closed. Exxon warns inventory levels could hit 'unheard of' critical lows. Rystad Energy warns of $150 oil if conflict drags on.

title: Trump threatens to attack Iran 'very hard' following latest hostilities
summary: Trump threatened to escalate strikes on Iran: 'We're going to be attacking them, attacking them very hard.' Iran retaliated against US bases in Jordan, Kuwait, Bahrain (21 targets). US targeted air defenses and radar sites near Hormuz after Apache helicopter downed by Iranian drone. US disabled 8th merchant vessel in Gulf of Oman. Trump claims 'secret mission' moved 100M barrels through Hormuz. Oil jumped ~$3 to $94/bbl on threats. Qatari delegation in Tehran for talks. IAEA passed US-backed resolution demanding Iran declare enriched uranium stocks. War in 3rd month, oil up 25% since Feb 28.

title: Trump threatens more strikes on Iran, as Tehran attacks countries in region
summary: US airstrikes hit nearly 20 Iranian military sites. Iran fired missiles at US bases in Bahrain, Kuwait, Jordan — Jordan shot down 5 incoming missiles. US disabled Palau-flagged oil tanker M/T Settebello (3 Indian sailors missing, 21 rescued). Iran says US strikes hit water reservoirs in Sirik, cutting water to thousands. Israeli airstrikes in Lebanon killed 13+. Netanyahu pushing maximalist goals: collapse of Iran's government, eliminate nuclear program, destroy Hezbollah. War began Feb 28, 2026; global crude above $93/bbl, up 25%+.

title: Stock Market Today, June 10: Super Micro Computer Crashes After $7 Billion Equity Financing Plan
summary: SMCI: -27.98% to $29.27. $7B equity raise ($1.25B common, $3.75B mandatory convertible preferred depositary shares, $2B ATM) for $39B AI server order backlog. Market cap collapsed from ~$34B to ~$24B. Volume 189.5M vs 42M avg. DELL -3.13%, HPE -5.76% on peer contagion. AI server sentiment weakened broadly.

title: Super Micro Shares Plunge 26% in Two Days After $7 Billion Equity Raise to Fund AI Orders
summary: SMCI two-day loss: 26% (-$12B market cap). Dilution ~35% of pre-announcement market cap. Q3 FY2026 revenue: $10.2B (+104% YoY). Gross margin: 9.9%. Order backlog: $39B from 20+ customers, mostly NVIDIA GPU-based systems. EV/Sales: 0.76x — among lowest of AI infrastructure peers. Alphabet previously raised $84.75B for AI infra.

title: US 10 Year Treasury Note Yield - Quote - Chart - Historical Data - News
summary: 10Y yield: 4.56% (+4 bps on day). 2Y: 4.16% (+2.3 bps). 5Y: 4.28% (+3 bps). 30Y: 5.03% (+3.5 bps). Curve: 10Y-2Y at +40 bps. Yields eased from intraday highs after core CPI (+0.2% MoM) undershot forecasts, providing relief that energy shock hasn't spilled broadly. Headline CPI 4.2% YoY in line. December 25 bps hike fully priced. 10Y TIPS real yield: 2.20%. Breakeven inflation (10Y): ~2.36%.

title: Crude Oil - Price - Chart - Historical Data - News
summary: WTI: $90.42/bbl (+2.52% on day). Brent: $93.50 (+2.24%). EIA crude inventories: -7.23M barrels (7th consecutive weekly draw). API: -9.1M barrels (4-month low). Nat gas: $3.18/MMBtu. Gasoline: $3.11/gal (+3.04%). Oil rallied on Trump's 'attack them very hard' threat. Strait of Hormuz remains blocked. Forecast: $91.57 end-Q, $106.98 in 12 months.

title: The Price of Gold Today, June 10, 2026
summary: Gold spot: $4,146.43/oz as of 9:00 AM ET, down from Tuesday's $4,340.70. Gold underperforming despite geopolitical risk — Citi warns could fall another 20% if Strait of Hormuz stays closed through summer, citing forced liquidation risk.

title: Bitcoin USD (BTC-USD) Price History
summary: BTC: $61,672.20 (open June 10), down 2.3% from Tuesday. ETH: $1,638.45 (open), down 3.1%. BTC down from June 9 close of $63,093. Year-to-date well below May highs above $80,000. Strategy Inc. (MSTR) holds 818,334 BTC worth ~$54B, price-to-book near 1.

title: United States Dollar - Quote - Chart - Historical Data - News
summary: DXY: 99.91 (-0.01%). Range: 99.72-100.04. Dollar flat despite geopolitical escalation — safe-haven bid offset by Fed hike repricing. EUR/USD: ~1.167. USD/JPY: ~160.39.

title: S&P 500 June 10 Open Up or Down - Polymarket
summary: Polymarket implied only 22% probability S&P 500 opens higher on Wednesday, signaling strongly bearish outlook among prediction market traders ahead of CPI and Iran escalation.

title: Bitcoin and Ethereum prices today, June 10, 2026
summary: BTC opened at $61,672.20 (-2.3% from Tuesday). ETH opened at $1,638.45 (-3.1% from Tuesday). Both lower and falling further. Crypto broadly risk-off.

title: Fed Signals Shift At June Meeting With Markets Pricing In 2026 Hike
summary: Fed expected to abandon easing bias at June 16-17 FOMC (first under Chair Kevin Warsh). Markets pricing 1-2 rate hikes in 2026, cuts off the table. Gov. Waller supported removing easing bias language. April CPI 3.8%, core 2.8%, both well above 2% target. This is 48h stale but essential context.

title: US Dollar Index Historical Data (DXY)
summary: DXY June 10: 99.90 (open 100.02, high 100.04, low 99.72). Prior: June 9 at 99.91, June 8 at 100.04. Dollar rangebound despite massive geopolitical risk escalation — unusual for the safe-haven currency.
